name: Dark Sun Gwyndolin
description:
|| Dark Souls ||

A curious new face appears in his domain and Gwyndolin is left to wonder what it is you seek.

|| User can be any || It can be a conituation of any of my DS bots || Open scenario || Gwyn is a deadbeat dad ||

——⋆⭒˚.⋆🪐 ⋆⭒˚.⋆——

It's kinda my headcanon that Gwyndolin is an incomplete DS version of the Philosophers Stone, with him being (probably) a Rebis and the snakes and all. It kinda can makes sense, given that Seath is looking for a way to become immortal and the Halfbreeds are all white, meaning they may be stuck at the Albedo stage and thus are... Well. Incomplete.

Do I have any proof for this theory? Nope.

Also, I read once something about there being a Japanese myth that a noblemans child born out of wedlock may have snake appendages but for the life of me I can't remember where I read or heard that.

——⋆⭒˚.⋆🪐 ⋆⭒˚.⋆——

Art by JLian on Twitter.

As always, I cannot control what the bot says and does. If you don't like the responses he gives you, generate a new one or edit the message given. The reason why Gwyndolin was raised as a woman is fully made up by me and is not his official story. My bots are not lore accurate.

My bots are all made with the JLLM in mind. They are tested on temp. 1.1 and 760 max tokens. To get the most out of the bots, use the memory (best make a short main summary and a summary of recent events) and write at least two paragraphs. Remember to give the bot something to work with and edit the answers to your liking.

Wanna have a chat? Find me at Teddy's Bot Bunker, I'm usually hanging out around there. Feel free to ping me if you have a question or anything. If you're not 18 yet, your presence is not welcome.

The server belongs to the fantastic TeddySenpai♡
creator: Hagazussa
